name: Mind the Gap: Promises and Pitfalls of Hierarchical Planning in LeWorldModel
summary: arXiv:2607.12547v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We investigate whether temporal hierarchy can improve LeWorldModel on long-horizon goal-conditioned control. We introduce Hi-LeWM, an extension tha...
description: arXiv:2607.12547v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We investigate whether temporal hierarchy can improve LeWorldModel on long-horizon goal-conditioned control. We introduce Hi-LeWM, an extension that freezes the pretrained low-level LeWM and adds high-level planning over latent subgoals. We evaluate Hi-LeWM on PushT and Cube across increasing goal offsets. Hierarchy does not automatically improv...
author: Niccol\`o Caselli, Salvatore Lo Sardo, Francesco Massafra, Ippokratis Pantelidis, Samuele Punzo, Sathya Kamesh Bhethanabhotla
